headline: Assessing Albemarle (ALB) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Conflicting Fair Value Signals
summary: Recent share performance snapshot Albemarle (ALB) has been under pressure recently, with the stock down about 6% over the past day, 11% over the past week and 9% over the past month, even as it remains higher year to date. See our latest analysis for Albemarle. Despite the recent pullback, with a 7 day share price return of down 11.37% and a 30 day share price return of down 8.78%, momentum is easing after a stronger 90 day share price return of 8.43% and a 1 year total shareholder return of...
